hero_layout: diagonal split — angled divider between visual and text
hero_headline_scale: large — noticeably big, makes a statement
card_style: cards with colored left/top accent border
cursor_effect: magnetic effect — buttons slightly attract cursor on hover
contact_style: playful — with a friendly CTA headline
spacing_density: ultra-spacious — luxury feel, huge gaps between sections
quirk: hero text must be extremely large, almost full viewport width
bonus_quirk: add a tiny animated element somewhere (spinning gear, blinking cursor, floating shape)
